channel.title: Pressure on DungeonPath
channel.description: Recent content in Pressure on DungeonPath

item.title: Pressure Codes and Secrets Guide: Active Codes, Easter Eggs, and Hidden Content (2026)
item.description: Complete guide to Pressure codes, easter eggs, secret rooms, and hidden content. Find all active codes and unlock exclusive rewards.

item.title: Pressure Common Mistakes Guide: 15 Things New Players Get Wrong (and How to Fix Them) (2026)
item.description: Avoid the most common mistakes new Pressure players make. Learn what not to do, why these mistakes cost you runs, and how to fix them immediately.

item.title: Pressure Floors and Locations Guide: Complete Map Walkthrough (2026)
item.description: Complete walkthrough for every floor and area in Pressure. Learn the layout of each floor, important rooms, escape routes, and hidden areas.

item.title: Pressure Items and Puzzles Guide: Every Item, Key, and Puzzle Solution (2026)
item.description: Complete guide to every item, keycard, and puzzle in Pressure. Learn what each item does, where to find them, and how to solve every puzzle type.

item.title: Pressure Multiplayer Guide: Co-op Strategies, Team Roles, and Communication Tips (2026)
item.description: Master Pressure's multiplayer mode with co-op strategies, team role assignments, communication tips, and group survival techniques.

item.title: Pressure Pro Survival Tips: Advanced Strategies to Reach Floor 100 (2026)
item.description: Advanced survival strategies for Pressure. Learn pro tips for entity avoidance, resource management, floor navigation, and reaching the deepest levels of the Hadal Blacksite.

item.title: Pressure Beginner Guide: Complete Walkthrough for New Players (2026)
item.description: Everything you need to survive the Hadal Blacksite in Roblox Pressure. Learn entity mechanics, item locations, and proven strategies to reach Room 100.

item.title: Pressure Entities Guide (May 2026): Every Monster and How to Survive
item.description: Complete bestiary of all entities in Roblox Pressure. Learn every monster's warning signs, survival strategies, and encounter locations.
